Full Text: The maximum height for a freestanding sign in a commercial zone is 10 feet from the average grade of the street upon which the sign is located. All freestanding signs shall be set back a minimum of five feet from any property line.
No sign shall be erected to a height greater than 35 feet. All signs shall be constructed in accordance with the building code.
No sign shall be erected at the intersection of any streets in such a manner as to obstruct free and clear vision.
